summary: Frontend testing completed for iPad-Verwaltung App import consolidation. All features verified working correctly - the 3 separate import functions (Schüler, iPads, Datenwiederherstellung) have been consolidated into a single 'Daten-Import' section in the Einstellungen tab.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Import consolidation testing completed. All tabs verified: Schüler tab shows 'Schüler verwalten' directly (no upload), iPad tab shows 'iPad-Status Übersicht' directly (no upload), Einstellungen tab has unified 'Daten-Import' section with proper description and .xlsx/.xls file input. All other tab functionality (Zuordnungen, Verträge, Benutzer) working correctly.

settings_tab_daten_import_section.description: Daten-Import section present with correct description 'Schüler, iPads oder vollständige Datensicherungen importieren'

ipad_tab_no_upload.description: iPad tab shows 'iPad-Status Übersicht' directly, no upload section

student_tab_no_upload.description: Schüler tab shows 'Schüler verwalten' directly, no upload section

other_tab_functions_working.description: All other tabs working: Schüler anlegen, iPads anlegen, Zuordnungen, Verträge, Benutzer
